fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Kentucky Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Kentucky - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: speech-language pathologist license reciprocity kentucky, how to transfer speech-language pathologist license to kentucky, speech-language pathologist compact kentucky, kentucky speech-language pathologist endorsement application

board.name: Board of Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology
board.parent_dept: Kentucky Board of SLP and Audiology

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: The full credential to independently practice speech-language pathology in Kentucky.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: Issued to SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Meet Educational Requirements
steps.description: Complete a master’s degree or doctoral degree program in speech-language pathology from an accredited educational institution.

steps.title: Complete Supervised Clinical Experience
steps.description: Complete a supervised clinical practicum of at least 400 clock hours, including 325 hours at the graduate level, as part of your degree program.

steps.title: Pass the National Examination and Apply for Licensure
steps.description: Achieve a passing score on the Praxis Examination in Speech-Language Pathology and submit a completed application with the required fee and documentation to the Kentucky Board of Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology.

telepractice_text: Kentucky permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Kentucky issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Kentucky is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Kentucky SLP license cost?
Is Kentucky part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Kentucky allow telepractice for SLPs?
Does Kentucky have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Kentucky participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Kentucky without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Kentucky?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Kentucky while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Kentucky is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

hero.title: Become a Speech-Language Pathologist in Kentucky
hero.dek: Kentucky Speech-Language Pathologist license requires a master's degree, supervised clinical experience, and passing the national exam.
